---
title: "Dashboards"
---

# 📊 Live Dashboards

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth provides live financial and economic dashboards powered through automated market data pipelines and cloud infrastructure.

</div>

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌍 Multi-Market Dashboard

Live monitoring of BRVM, NGX, and U.S. market activity.

[Open Dashboard](http://dashboard.dahowealth.com/market){.btn .btn-primary}

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 📈 BRVM Analytics

BRVM pricing, volume, and regional market analysis.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🇳🇬 NGX Market Intelligence

Nigerian market tracking with live SQL-backed financial datasets.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🌡️ Economic Intelligence

Inflation, commodity pricing, and macroeconomic dashboards across African markets.

</div>

</div>

<div class="site-footer">
  <p>
    © 2026 Daho Wealth • Financial & Economic Intelligence Platform
  </p>

  <p>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jpsossavi/" target="_blank">
      LinkedIn
    </a>

    •

    <a href="https://www.facebook.com/p/Daho-Wealth-61575871481173/" target="_blank">
      Facebook
    </a>
  </p>
</div>
